message:
feat(mux-server): add frankenterm-mux-server crates + complete wezterm naming migration

Workspace changes:
- Add frankenterm-mux-server and frankenterm-mux-server-impl as new
  workspace members for modular mux server functionality
- Update Cargo.lock with new crate entries and dns-lookup dependency

Naming migration (wezterm-mux-server -> frankenterm-mux-server):
- main.rs: update pgrep pattern, startup command, error messages,
  remote SSH setup (systemd service name, paths, unit description),
  and user-facing output across 15 call sites
- config/unix.rs: update binary name in resolve_mux_server_command()
  for both Unix and Windows variants, update docstrings

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
